channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Why 'command not found' still appears after installing a CLI tool (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut debugging time by 70% with these command-line tool fixes — command not found, shell hash cache, and PATH issues demystified with exact commands and benchmarks.

item.title: The 10-hour AI workflow that actually works
item.description: Cut manual indexing time by 15 hours a month with a local AI workflow that watches folders, OCRs files, and searches in under 10 seconds — no cloud bill, no LLM hallucinations, just a 2020 MacBook Pro.

item.title: How we survived a ransomware attack and lost only 3 hours
item.description: Survived a ransomware attack with only 52 minutes of downtime and zero data loss — here’s the exact backup strategy, restore process, and tools that saved us $280,000 and 3000 customer invoices

item.title: How we turned a $24K loss into $186K profit by switching platform models
item.description: Turned PayWise from losing $24K/month to earning $73K/month by switching from a centralized balance sheet to a distributed platform model — default rates fell 66%, approvals rose 9%, and engineering costs dropped 23%. A step-by-step guide to unbundling risk and aligning incentives in two-sided markets.

item.title: The Open Source Business Models That Work: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut The Open Source Business Models That Work failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a ste…

item.title: How lazy loading cut our page load time by 58% under 3G
item.description: Cut page load time by 58% under 3G with route-level lazy loading and code splitting — real numbers, real devices, and the mistakes that broke first loads.

item.title: Build a Content Algorithm Simulator in 60 Minutes
item.description: Simulate a social media algorithm in 60 minutes and increase reach by 70% — content algorithm simulator, platform weights, reach delta, 0.8s replay time for 10k posts

item.title: VS Code Setup That Cuts Debug Sessions in Half
item.description: Cut debug session time by 58% with this VS Code setup — real numbers from Lagos and Berlin, extension list, and the SSH tunnel trick that saved 2+ minutes per session.

item.title: Data Warehouse vs Data Lake vs Lakehouse: Which One: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Data Warehouse vs Data Lake vs Lakehouse: Which One failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes,…

item.title: Choose a Message Queue in 30 Minutes: Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS
item.description: Cut message queue setup time by 80% with this step-by-step comparison of Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS — real latency, RAM, and cost numbers from a 2024 MacBook Pro test run.

item.title: AI Ethics is a PR Tour: The 7 Uncomfortable Truths
item.description: Discover why 7 AI ethics failures happen in production, not the lab — with real examples, code, and trade-offs. Learn what Big Tech won’t tell you about bias, power, and the systems that amplify harm.

item.title: Terraform in 2024: 12 battle-tested setups ranked
item.description: Cut cloud bills 18% and plan time 74% with 12 Terraform modules tested on 3G in Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya — CIDR math, IPv6 egress savings, and the modules that survive intermittent VPNs.

item.title: Tech Interview Red Flags vs Green Flags That Matter
item.description: Cut interview failure rates by 62% with modern hygiene vs 2018-style code. Learn the exact red flags that cost candidates jobs and the green flags that get offers — with benchmarks, cost data, and actionable fixes.

item.title: Why your team ignores your docs (and how to make them read it)
item.description: Cut repeated onboarding questions by 73% with ritual-focused docs, environment contracts, and lightweight telemetry. Includes Makefile snippets, regional caveats table, and a ‘docs health score’ dashboard you can copy today.

item.title: Developer Productivity: What Research Actually Shows (and Why Your Metrics Lie)
item.description: Developer productivity metrics lie 72% of the time — here’s the proof and how to measure what actually matters with concrete numbers and case studies from distributed teams.

item.title: Real-Time Data Processing at Scale: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Real-Time Data Processing at Scale failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a step-by-st…

item.title: Redis at scale: How we cut cache misses by 63% and latency by 71%
item.description: Cut Redis cache misses by 63% and P99 latency by 71% — LFU eviction, write-through, client tracking, and chaos testing for production clusters

item.title: Why your mobile app feels slow even when it shouldn't
item.description: Cut cold-start by 49% and frame time by 32% with these fixes — mobile performance, real device profiling, and the mistakes that hide 200 ms stalls.

item.title: Slow SQL Queries Explained: Identifying and Fixing 80% of Performance Issues
item.description: SQL Optimization: but shows 95% memory free. You’ve hit the c. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Caching Strategies That Actually Improve Performance: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Caching Strategies That Actually Improve Performance failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes…
